ad_platform.description: Use virtual cards to run ads without limits. Manage budgets, issue cards instantly, and scale campaigns across multiple platforms with ease.

features.major_platforms: Works with all major ad platforms

low_fees.description: Save more on every transaction with simple, transparent fees designed to keep your money moving smarter.

scale_tools.description: Issue cards, control budgets, track transactions, and manage your financial workflow with a clean and secure platform.

secure.title: Secure Control

insights.title: Clear Spending Insights

asset_control.description: Track balances, monitor spending, and manage every virtual card from a clean dashboard built for fast decisions.

features.description: Control your wallet balance, fund virtual cards, track transactions, and earn cashback from one secure dashboard.

wallet.title: Wallet Balance
wallet.description: View total balance, available balance, allocated funds, and frozen amount in real time.

virtual_cards.title: Virtual Cards

deposit_withdraw.title: Deposit & Withdraw
